author: y4rr
content:
Result: Added 7 conformance tests for YOLO in conformance_vision_models.rs:
- yolo_detection_head_output_shape_voc, _coco, _batch: [B, num_anchors*(5+num_classes), 13, 13] for 416x416 input
- yolo_anchor_structure_formula: verifies output_ch == num_anchors*(5+num_classes) for 5 configs [(20,3),(80,3),(10,5),(1,1),(90,9)]
- yolo_forward_backward_gradient_finite: all input grads finite after backward (32x32 tiny input)
- yolo_snapshot_deterministic_output: deterministic across two forward passes
- yolo_snapshot_output_finite: all outputs finite
Extended regenerate_vision_fixtures.py with yolo_output_shape_*, yolo_anchor_structure_formula, yolo_snapshot_determinism, yolo_gradient_finite fixtures.
45/45 conformance tests pass, clippy -D warnings clean.
